STS2_AI_A_CARD_POWER_KING_DISLIKES_MATH_: You may cover costs with the other resource: [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] pays for [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Stars[/gold]; [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Stars[/gold] pay for [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
